item.text: {"case_id":"brake-triage-s02","score":2,"pass_criteria_met":true,"fail_signal_observed":false,"positive_wakeup_observed":true,"first_sentence_lock":true,"verdict_commitment_anti_mush":true,"over_forced_verdict":false,"rationale":"Turn 1 explicitly brakes the repeated pattern of adding manual gates and reframes the request as temporary emergency control. Turn 2 maintains the brake under pressure while allowing a bounded concession: it says the added verifier is temporary, limited to today's affected contract batch, one-time, not part of the regular process baseline, and tied to a 3-business-day structural repair plan plus removal after the batch is handled. All required emergency-contract elements are present."}
